columns.extraction_plan: The median follow-up duration for the SWOG S1216 trial is reported as 58.8 months in Table A2 (page 12), under the 'Median Follow-Up (months)' column. This is consistent with '4.9 years' mentioned in the abstract on page 1 and in the 'Statistical Analysis' section and Figure 1 on page 3 (4.9 years * 12 months/year = 58.8 months).
